Interface IDataStatistics

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members to generate statistics on a field.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("CA691DD5-8A14-11D2-AE6C-080009EC732A")]
public interface IDataStatistics

Properties

Cancelled

Indicates if the operation has been cancelled.

bool Cancelled { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Continue

Indicates if the cursor contains more records than the current sample.

bool Continue { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Cursor

The cursor which will generate the statistics.

ICursor Cursor { set; }

Property Value

ICursor

Examples

Sample Snippet

Field

The field for which to gather statistics.

string Field { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

SampleRate

The maximum number of records to sample at a time (-1 means pull all records).

int SampleRate { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

SimpleStats

Indicates whether only simple statistics are generated.

bool SimpleStats { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Statistics

The statistics for the current field over the current cursor.

IStatisticsResults Statistics { get; }

Property Value

IStatisticsResults

Examples

Sample Snippet

UniqueValueCount

The number of unique values for the current sample.

int UniqueValueCount { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

UniqueValues

The unique values for the current field over the current cursor.

IEnumerator UniqueValues { get; }
